items.name_cn:
Niki_22cm Elephant Grain Suede
Unisex salt-style college aesthetic shoulder and crossbody bag
Lightweight and soft lambskin, overall low-key luxury and versatile. The commuter shape works for both casual and salt styles. Black with black logo, the design is more minimalist. Shoulder strap is not detachable, easy to style.
If you like it, you can definitely get it. A timeless style.
Model: 633151 Elephant Grain
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_cn:
💰
ys1 Jamie 4.3 large pochon Suede Shoulder Bag
The designer really understands what consumers need, doesn't they?
Many tote bag designs fail to balance aesthetics and practicality.
But! This tote does it!
It is lightweight, spacious, and elegant!
It is a practical tote with on-point design and a luxurious feel.
I think it looks better than the 22bag.
Is it okay to say that 😝
It is also a mommy bag that allows you to be elegant while taking care of your baby~
34×27×3cm
Model: 809824

items.name_cn:
💰
New Sade hobo is here!
Black lambskin material, super soft and smooth 😎 Rhombus quilted lambskin HOBO bag LECASSANDRE. This versatile fashion handbag comes with a folding top handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying ways. Equipped with a thin long chain. A small bag that fits a phone completely, can be carried by hand or crossbody, so exquisite!
 Shoulder strap length: 55cm
Model: 793608 [Original Leather]
Size: 19x21x4cm

items.name_cn:
💰
🌸 CALYPSO_ Elephant Print Suede Chain Bag
Made of imported Italian lambskin, soft and delicate to the touch. Classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are all made of matte gold hardware. The bag uses a magnetic four-clasp closure at the opening, ensuring excellent sealing and security. There is a zippered inner pocket inside for placing a phone and valuables; aside from that, there are no extra inner pockets, making it free and easy to use!
Size: 28×22×12cm
Model: 777399 (Elephant Print)

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
items.name_cn:
New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
Fine-grain leather tote, fully lined in matching suede, adorned with exquisite Y letter logo inspired by the brand's historical collection. The shopping bag is lightweight and spacious, featuring an internal zippered pocket and a hook closure! A touch of Parisian sophistication with a relaxed vibe, don't miss this if you love large capacity bags!
Style No.: 817602
Size: 37X32X7CM

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
2024 New Fall/Winter PARIS VII POCHON
The new pochon design is unique and practical, with soft leather and a spacious interior... It holds everything from your phone, wallet, to cosmetics. The exquisite drawstring design offers security while adding a touch of fashion! The fine, smooth leather texture fits the wearer's body perfectly. Ultra-lightweight and extra-large capacity, creating a romantic and elegant French relaxed vibe🖤
Style No.: 804302
Size: 24x30x12CM

items.name_cn:
🗯💰
▪️LE 5 À 7▪
The Y brand's much-anticipated underarm bag is finally here!!️
I loved the name at first sight; it is inspired by the niche film 'Cléo from 5 to 7', telling the story of the 5-7 PM gap between work and home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, appearing firm yet not too sharp.
Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, the overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
Model No.: 657228 Patent Leather

LOULOU PUFFER quilted lambskin bag, made with genuine authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y brand logo, chain, and buckle eyes are all in matte silver gold hardware; the bag opening uses a magnetic four-buckle closure, offering excellent sealing and security; the bag features a zippered inner pocket for your phone and valuables, with no other unnecessary pockets, making it easy to use! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Size: 29x17x11cm Model No.: 577476 168600
